expectations.evidence: Uses GitHub App token approach (generic GitHub knowledge) instead of gh-aw's github-token-for-extra-empty-commit feature
Correctly explains GITHUB_TOKEN pushes don't trigger workflows
Uses generic repo rulesets/CODEOWNERS instead of gh-aw's protected-files: safe output feature
Uses branch protection rules instead of gh-aw's allowed-events: [COMMENT, REQUEST_CHANGES] feature
Provides YAML but uses generic GitHub Actions patterns, not gh-aw safe-output configuration
